features.description: Read-only categoria listing for product categories
steps: Verify each item has: id, codigo, nombre, descripcion

features.description: CRUD for Solicitud Material with nested detail lines
steps: POST /api/logistics/requests/solicitudes-material with header + 3 detail lines — verify 201
Verify header has motivo, fecha_solicitud, solicitado_por
Verify each detail line has producto, cantidad, unidad_medida, estatus
GET /api/logistics/requests/solicitudes-material/{id} — verify detail includes nested detalles array

features.description: CRUD for Requerimiento with nested detail lines
steps: POST /api/logistics/requests/requerimientos with header + 2 detail lines — verify 201
Verify header has numero_requerimiento, motivo, fecha_requerimiento
Verify each item has: id, numero_cotizacion

features.description: Solicitud material detail lines reference products correctly
steps: Create solicitud with detail line referencing existing producto
Verify producto name matches when fetching detail

features.description: Solicitud Material list page with aero-data-grid
steps: Verify page-layout with title 'Solicitudes de Material'
Verify grid columns: motivo, fecha_solicitud, solicitado_por
Click row — verify navigates to detail

features.description: Solicitud Material form with dynamic detail lines
steps: Click 'Agregar Linea' to add detail line
Fill detail: producto (with search/lookup), cantidad, unidad_medida (from catalog dropdown)
Remove first detail line — verify FormArray updates

features.description: Requerimiento list and form follow same pattern
steps: Verify list page loads with aero-data-grid
Verify form has header + detail lines pattern
Verify simple list shows all 25 categories
Verify tab bar includes: Solicitudes, Requerimientos, Categorias (in addition to existing tabs)
